summary: Implemented three features: (1) Per-provider system prompt suffixes via provider_prompt_suffix(ProviderKind, model_name) -> Option<String> in ava-agent/system_prompt.rs. Anthropic gets tool_use conciseness notes plus adaptive-thinking hints for claude-4.6 models. OpenAI gets function-calling emphasis plus reasoning-model note for o3/o4/codex. Gemini gets explicit-parameters guidance. OpenRouter gets balanced defaults. Ollama/Copilot/Inception get no suffix (base prompt is sufficient). The suffix is injected in inject_system_prompt() using self.llm.provider_kind() BEFORE the user-configurable system_prompt_suffix, so both stack. (2) Tool schema transforms for Gemini via transform_schema_for_provider(provider, schema) -> Value in ava-llm/providers/common/parsing.rs. Gemini-specific: converts integer enums to string enums (Gemini rejects integer enums in functionDeclarations), adds items:{type:string} to arrays missing an items field. The transform is applied automatically inside tools_to_gemini_format(). Non-Gemini providers pass through unchanged. (3) Thinking/reasoning config was already fully implemented in the existing providers (Anthropic adaptive thinking with type:adaptive + output_config.effort, OpenAI reasoning_effort for o-series, Gemini thinkingConfig with thinkingBudget or thinkingLevel) - no changes needed. Added 16 new tests (8 for provider_prompt_suffix in system_prompt.rs, 8 for transform_schema_for_provider/tools_to_gemini_format in parsing.rs). CLI smoke test: kimi-k2.5 via openrouter responded with PROVIDER_OK.
